news.t: Invesco Expands BulletShares Suite With New Treasury ETFs
Kip ETF 20: What's In, What's Out and Why

overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2026 Corporate Bond ETF (BSCQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of investment grade corporate bonds with effective maturities in 2026. The fund will unwind in December 2026 and return capitals and proceeds to investors. BSCQ was launched on Sep 14, 2016 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco Expands BulletShares Suite With New Treasury ETFs
data.text: On June 10, Invesco launched the new BulletShares Treasury Bond ETFs. These funds offer target maturities between 2027 to 2031, with an expense ratio of seven basis points.

data.title: Kip ETF 20: What's In, What's Out and Why
data.text: These days, checking on how your investments are doing feels a little like asking for a hard punch in the gut. Nearly every major asset class has suffered losses in recent months.
